subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One of the world calleth, from the horizon of the Most Great Prison, unto the friends of God and remindeth them through sacred utterances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مظلوم عالم از افق سجن اعظم دوستان الهی را ندا میفرماید و ببیانات مقدسه متذکر
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
